title: lastrea noveboracensis
intro: Lastrea noveboracensis, also known as the New York fern, is a species of fern that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Lastrea noveboracensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
